# CG3H Builder

Runtime builder for [CG3H](https://github.com/Enderclem0/CG3H) mesh mods.

Builds modded GPK files on your machine using your local game files — no copyrighted content is distributed.

## For mod users

Install this package via r2modman. CG3H mesh mods that require it will list it as a dependency.

## For mod creators

Add `Enderclem-CG3HBuilder-3.0.0` to your mod's Thunderstore dependencies.
